GeometricPoints.description: Define the number of decimal points to round the geometry coordinates to. Defaults is 4

BuildingLocation.description: Define the number of decimal points to round the Building Location data to. Default is 5

LayerThickness.description: Define the number of decimal points to round the Layer Thickness to. Default is 4

MaterialConductivity.description: Define the number of decimal points to round the Material Conductivity to. Default is 3

MaterialDensity.description: Define the number of decimal points to round the Material Density to. Default is 3

MaterialReflectance.description: Define the number of decimal points to round the Material Reflectance to. This is both Solar and Light Reflectance. Default is 3

MaterialTransmittance.description: Define the number of decimal points to round the Material Transmittance to. This is both Solar and Light Transmittance. Default is 3

MaterialEmittance.description: Define the number of decimal points to round the Material Emittance to. Default is 3

GeometryWidth.description: Define the number of decimal points to round the Width of geometry to. Default is 3

GeometryHeight.description: Define the number of decimal points to round the Height of geometry to. Default is 3

GeometryAzimuth.description: Define the number of decimal places to round the Azimuth of geometry to. Default is 3

GeometryTilt.description: Define the number of decimal points to round the Tilt of geometry to. Default is 3

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
